name: Fibery
description: Fibery is a work management platform that combines project management, knowledge management, and collaboration tools in a connected workspace.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Fibery workspace
2. Go to Settings (gear icon) > API Tokens
3. Click 'Create Token' and give it a name (e.g. 'CompAI')
4. Copy the generated token
5. Enter your workspace name (the subdomain from your Fibery URL) and the API token below

credentialFields.label: Workspace Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Fibery workspace subdomain. For example, if your Fibery URL is https://mycompany.fibery.io, enter 'mycompany'

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Go to Fibery Settings > API Tokens > Create Token. Copy the generated token.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users in the Fibery workspace to verify employee access is properly managed.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Checks user roles and permissions in the Fibery workspace to verify role-based access controls are implemented.
